title: Export Gantt PDF/Excel including dependency
excerpt:
Dependency is not available while exporting Gantt charts 
Visualizing is important

posts.author: SharonZomerstein (Sharon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dependency is not available while exporting Gantt charts
Visualizing is important

posts.author: Juanfv (Juan Guillermo)
posts.cookedHtml: That will be a really good tool to improve the presentation of gantt to clients

posts.author: Ugljesa_J (Ugljesa Janjic)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, this would be great visualizing tool for my clients.
These guys are not serious.
Have to make sure to uncheck the auto-renew on my subscription.

posts.author: leeqiqi (Lee Qi Qi)
posts.cookedHtml: When exporting gantt chart to PDF, the dependency lines between activities are not displayed. This is important for the visualisation. May I know if there is any timeline for this limitation to be fixed? Thanks.
